coderepo_name: HackerWallet App Django React Code Repo

feedback: Challenging test, interesting task to time ratio, overall stimulating.

Running out of time on an exercise you perfectly know how to solve is frustrating. In the last question, the hot reloading doesn’t work, so you have to reload the preview tab manually. When you do, the in-progress reservation is lost, which forces you to start over. There are also multiple ESLint issues that distract you from making progress.

Finally, I think each exercise should include an estimated completion time so candidates can allocate their time better. I assumed about 30 minutes per exercise, and that was definitely not enough to complete the last challenge. It would also help to emphasize that the 1:30 is a hard deadline and the test will close at that point, rather than a suggested time to completion (as many other industry tests do).

While I understand that it is necessary to test a candidate across various areas this test has too many concepts being tested and it is very hard to completely do it without being able to refer to documentation. It would be very helpful if at least official documentation was allowed.

Another problem is that the test was too technology specific. Focusing on React and React router framework's concepts, and Spring framework and JPA specific way of doing things.
